reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: Appendix B (found on page 35 of the source PDF) is completely missing from the output. The JSON contains Appendix A (pages 31-34) and then jumps to Appendix C (page 36). While there is an omission block earlier in the document (between the Executive Summary and Appendix A), there is no omission note or placeholder for the content specifically between Appendix A and Appendix C. This is a critical failure as an entire section of the report is lost.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Appendix B: NC Geographic Information Coordinating Council Establishing Authority and Precedent... The North Carolina Geographic Information Coordinating Council was established by Senate Bill 895 in August 2001 and was incorporated in the General Statutes §143-725 through 143- 727.
concerns.output_quote: [Missing section between Appendix A (reading_order 281) and Appendix C (reading_order 291)]

concerns.analysis: The heading hierarchy is inverted on the title page (Section 1). The main title 'The Power of Place' is correctly tagged as H1 (reading_order 3), but the text preceding it ('North Carolina' and 'Geographic Information Coordinating Council') are tagged as H2 (reading_order 1 and 2). This results in H2 subheadings appearing before and outside of the H1 parent heading, which is a structural nesting error for screen reader navigation.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: North Carolina / Geographic Information Coordinating Council / The Power of Place
concerns.output_quote: {"type": "heading", "level": 2, "text": "North Carolina"}, {"type": "heading", "level": 2, "text": "Geographic Information Coordinating Council"}, {"type": "heading", "level": 1, "text": "The Power of Place"}

concerns.analysis: There are multiple structural issues in the tables. In Appendix C (Sections 37 and 38), the first row of data on each page is incorrectly identified as a header row ('is_header_row': true) even though they contain data values like 'NCDOT Pavement Condition Survey...' and 'Shellfish Growing Areas' rather than the actual column headers (TITLE, CUSTODIAN). Additionally, in Appendix A (Section 34), the row for 'Advisory Members' is rendered with only 1 cell ('colspan': 1) in a table defined by 3-col
